stdout:
I found a newer commit after the last failed review that appears to add the missing mathematical connection. I’ll now inspect the exact Lean theorem chain and verify quality gates locally.


## Success criteria from issue description

The previously missing end-to-end claim is now addressed.

`mod_pow_mont_correct` still yields loop-spec equality (`MontgomeryRoundtrip.lean:1178-1196`), and the new `fp_pow_correct` theorem (`1333-1386`) bridges this to mathematical exponentiation after de-Montgomery conversion:

`from_mont(mod_pow_mont(P, base, exp)) = from_mont(base)^exp mod P`.

The loop/progress/invariant pieces requested in the issue are present (`Progress.lean:520-587`, `MontgomeryRoundtrip.lean:982-1170`).

## Separation of concerns

Pass.

Only `proofs/Gf2Core/Proofs/MontgomeryRoundtrip.lean` changed since the last failed review commit. No `gf2-core` ↔ `gf2-coding` dependency inversion.

## Functional paradigm and performance

Pass for scope.

Proof-only Lean changes; no kernel/runtime GF(2) implementation changes.

## Correctness

Pass.

`redc_value_spec` is explicitly used in both multiply/square branches (`MontgomeryRoundtrip.lean:1085-1087`, `1148-1150`) and connected via `redc_eq_mont_mul` (`991-1015`).

The conditional squaring guard (`if exp2 > 0`) is handled in both branches (`1099-1124`, `1140-1163`), matching issue concerns.

Final mathematical semantics are proven via `fp_pow_correct` (`1343-1386`).

## Testing

Local `lake/cargo` execution was permission-blocked in this environment, so I used provided run metadata.

`lake-build` is passed (latest metadata). No evidence of new test/lint failures in the changed scope.

## Unsafe isolation

Pass.

No Rust unsafe additions; only Lean proof edits.

## Documentation

Pass for this proof task.

New theorem is documented with explanatory docstring and executable-style statement (`fp_pow_correct`, `1333+`).

## Prior review feedback for this issue

Addressed.

Most recent failure said the proof stopped at internal loop spec. New commit adds `fp_pow_correct`, resolving that exact gap.

## Jit issue dependencies

No dependencies listed; no prerequisite blocker.

VERDICT: PASS
---
Gate result: PASSED
